channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Barkley runs for 78- and 62-yard TDs in the snow and Eagles top Rams 28-22 to head to NFC title game
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Saquon Barkley blew through a hole and ran untouched in the wintry mix, the Eagles' 2,000-yard rusher smacking his helmet with his hand on his final snowy steps of a 78-yard touchdown run.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Austria's Sepp Straka cruises to a 2-shot victory over Justin Thomas at The American Express
item.description: LA QUINTA, Calif. (AP) — Sepp Straka won The American Express by two shots over Justin Thomas on Sunday, finishing his third career PGA Tour victory at 25-under 263 with a final-round 70.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Man United boss Ruben Amorim thinks this might be the worst team in the club's history
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Ruben Amorim delivered a withering assessment of his Manchester United team after its latest loss, admitting it might be the “worst” side in the club's storied history.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers continue offseason dominance, sign All-Star reliever
item.description: As the Los Angeles Dodgers stormed toward the World Series last October, one weakness was consistently brought up for the Boys in Blue: relief pitching.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Lions CB Amik Robertson hurt and QB Jared Goff misses a series in playoff game vs. Commanders
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Detroit Lions cornerback Amik Robertson suffered an elbow injury on the Washington Commanders' second snap and walked off the field in tears in Saturday night's divisional playoff game. Robertson was ruled out for the game. He was hurt tackling receiver Terry McLaurin.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cooper Flagg returns to New England and leads No. 3 Duke past Boston College 88-63
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Cooper Flagg scored 28 points, settling down after missing four of his first five shots on Saturday night to lead No. 3 Duke to its 12th straight victory, 88-63 over Boston College. Tyrese Proctor added 20 points for the Blue Devils (16-2, 8-0 Atlantic Coast Conference).
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears brass engaged in talks about potential trade for Steelers coach Mike Tomlin: report
item.description: The Pittsburgh Steelers' latest disappointing postseason run with Mike Tomlin sparked some questions about whether the franchise should trade the accomplished coach.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mahomes and Kelce help Chiefs to a 23-14 win over Texans and another AFC title game trip
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes has never lost in the divisional round of the playoffs with the Kansas City Chiefs. The Houston Texans still have never won.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Washington retires its first women's jersey, sending Kelsey Plum's No. 10 to the rafters
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — It was always a matter of when — not if — Washington would retire Kelsey Plum’s number. Eight years after she graduated, it happened. At halftime of its game against Purdue on Saturday, Washington sent its first women's jersey to the rafters, retiring the No.
item.dc:creator: JOSH KIRSHENBAUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Breanna Stewart scores first basket in Unrivaled history in debut of 3-on-3 women's league
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Unrivaled shined brightly on its opening night. The 3-on-3 women’s basketball league co-founded by WNBA stars Breanna Stewart and Napheesa Collier debuted Friday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chiefs fans banking on three-peat during Wild Card Weekend
item.description: The NFL playoffs kicked off on Saturday, but the Kansas City Chiefs have to wait another week for their playoff campaign to start. It’s leaving fans with mixed feelings.
item.dc:creator: Jacob Sloan, NewsNation

item.title: Girls Basketball: Rancho Buena Vista 56, La Costa Canyon 51
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Girls Basketball on Wednesday evening part of girls and boys doubleheader for league action. Camille Dake, Senior from RBV lead the way for the Longhorns. Great game that ended with the home team winning 56-51.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Wave FC trades Jaedyn Shaw to the North Carolina Courage
item.description: Midfielder Jaedyn Shaw has been traded by the San Diego Wave FC to the North Carolina Courage, the football club announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Patriots introduce Mike Vrabel as new head coach
item.description: The New England Patriots are set to formally introduce Mike Vrabel as the team's 16th head coach in franchise history.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: Buccaneers lose to Commanders 23-20; Commanders first playoff win in nearly 7,000 days
item.description: Jayden Daniels ran for a critical first down to set up Zane Gonzalez's 37-yard field goal that clanged off the right upright and went through as time expired, and the Commanders beat the Tampa Bay Buccaneers 23-20 in an NFC wild-card game Sunday night for the franchise’s first playoff win in 6,945 d
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI AP Pro Football Writer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Hurts tosses 2 TD passes and Goedert throws 3 stiff-arms to lead Eagles past Packers 22-10
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Dallas Goedert fired one stiff arm to a Packers defender, smacked him again and then — in a sports city known for its Broad Street Bullies — dispatched one final shot to the face on his way to end zone.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5
